languages.text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.

languages.text:
Урон от оружия обладателя аугмента рассчитывается по его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силы{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнего Боя{/g}, если эти {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристики{/g} выше.
{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Атаки в ближнем бою{/g} обладателя аугмента против {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}добычи{/g} получают +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Урон от оружия обладателя аугмента рассчитывается по его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силы{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнего Боя{/g}, если эти {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристики{/g} выше.
{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Атаки в ближнем бою{/g} обладателя аугмента против {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}добычи{/g} получают +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента получает +{uip|Crit|3588ff722d644bc0801bda9edddd85b6}% к {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}шансу критического попадания{/g} при атаке в ближнем бою.

Урон от оружия обладателя аугмента рассчитывается по его {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силы{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g} вместо {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнего Боя{/g}, если эти {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристики{/g} выше.

Обладатель аугмента получает +{uip|Crit|3588ff722d644bc0801bda9edddd85b6}% к {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}шансу критического попадания{/g} при атаке в ближнем бою.

languages.text:
La puntuación de daño del arma del usuario se calcula utilizando su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} en lugar de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g}, y su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Habilidad de proyectiles{/g} en lugar de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}, si tales {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} son mayores.
Los {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataques cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} que efectúa el usuario contra una {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}presa{/g} ganan un +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Waffenschaden des Nutzers wird basierend auf seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g} und seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistik-Fähigkeit{/g} anstelle der {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g} berechnet, wenn diese {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} höher sind.
Die {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriffe{/g} des Nutzers gegen {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}Beute{/g} erhalten +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerinin{/g} sırasıyla {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} niteliklerinden daha yüksek olduğu durumda kullanıcının silah hasarı; Kuvvet yerine Zekâ, Silah Yeteneği yerine Balistik Yetenek niteliğine göre hesaplanır.
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}ava{/g} yaptığı {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırıları{/g}, +%{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri kazanır.
languages.original_text:

traits.locale_text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}niteliklerinin{/g} sırasıyla {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} niteliklerinden daha yüksek olduğu durumda kullanıcının silah hasarı; Kuvvet yerine Zekâ, Silah Yeteneği yerine Balistik Yetenek niteliğine göre hesaplanır.
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}ava{/g} yaptığı {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırıları{/g}, +%{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri kazanır.

languages.text:
Les dégâts de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.
Ses {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaques de mêlée{/g} contre les {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}proies{/g} bénéficient d'un bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} de +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43} %.
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} against {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}prey{/g} gain +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Les dégâts de l'arme de l'utilisateur sont calculés en fonction de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g} au lieu de sa {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, selon ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} les plus élevées.

languages.text:
如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器伤害时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，弹道技能代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。
使用者对{g|Encyclopedia:Prey}猎物{/g}发起{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}时，获得{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}%的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The user's weapon damage is calculated using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, if those {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are higher.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} against {g|Encyclopedia:Prey}prey{/g} gain +{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
如果{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}更高，使用者计算武器伤害时使用智力代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}，弹道技能代替{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}。
使用者对{g|Encyclopedia:Prey}猎物{/g}发起{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}时，获得{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}%的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者の武器ダメージは、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}筋力{/g}の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}知力{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}近接技能{/g}の代わりに{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}射撃技能{/g}を用いて計算される（それらの{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}能力値{/g}の方が高い場合）。
{g|Encyclopedia:Prey}獲物{/g}に対する使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}は、+{uip|Pen|47e2502cae69411689d491291a9fbf43}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}を得る。
